mapper.select: SELECT b.id, b.goods_id, g.title, g.pic, b.sort, b.is_active FROM banner b INNER JOIN goods g ON g.id = b.goods_id WHERE b.is_active = 1 AND g.status = 1 AND g.is_show = 1 ORDER BY b.sort ASC, b.id ASC LIMIT 3
SELECT b.id, b.goods_id, g.title, g.pic, b.sort, b.is_active FROM banner b INNER JOIN goods g ON g.id = b.goods_id ORDER BY b.sort ASC, b.id ASC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM banner WHERE goods_id = #{goodsId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO banner(goods_id, sort, is_active) VALUES (#{goodsId}, #{sort}, #{isActive})
mapper.update: UPDATE banner SET sort = #{sort}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
